steps.title: Express the obtuse angle
steps.content:
An acute angle and an adjacent obtuse angle are supplementary. If the acute angle is $(10x-470)^{\circ}$, then an obtuse angle is
$$
180-(10x-470)=650-10x
$$

steps.title: Add the requested angles
steps.content:
The sum of one acute angle and three obtuse angles is
$$
(10x-470)+3(650-10x)
$$
$$
=10x-470+1{,}950-30x
$$
$$
=-20x+1{,}480
$$

steps.title: Match the constant term
steps.content: The problem gives the sum as $(-20x+w)^{\circ}$, so compare constants. $$ w=1{,}480 $$ The answer is 1480.
